:mod:`core` --- Core classes
============================

.. module:: core
   :synopsis: Core classes and utilities.

.. moduleauthor:: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

Introduction
************
    All the different features in SemperPy are developped as independently as possible
    to make sure that sub-parts of the framework can be used without the need for the
    whole framework to be installed and particularly to be known by the user.

    The Core module of SemperPy is an exception as most other modules will probably
    depend on this one. However, it is meant to be lightweight and define very
    general tools. It is strongly recommended to make use of the tools supplied
    in core to make the maintenance of the framework easier through changes in Python
    and other main modules.

Contents:
*********

   :maxdepth: 2

   configfile
   configure
   date
   dategroup
   factory
   index
   innerpython
